metadata.source: Syngenta Knowledge Base + NASA Space Flight Human-System Standard (NASA-STD-3001)
metadata.notes: Daily requirements based on Syngenta KB baseline of 3,000 kcal/person/day (higher than NASA ISS standard of 2,500 due to Mars surface EVA workload). Calorie modifiers reflect role-specific energy expenditure. Vitamin D: 15ug/day — greenhouse cannot produce this; supplement mandatory.

crew.name: Cmdr. Chen
crew.note: Requested spinach 3 times this week. Prefers stir-fry style preparation with basil. Light EVA schedule. Appreciates lettuce wraps as lunch staple.

crew.name: Dr. Okonkwo
crew.note: Vegetarian preference. Lab-focused work, lowest energy expenditure. Values variety in meals. Enjoys radish as crunchy snack between shifts. Excited about soybean-lentil combinations.

crew.name: Eng. Volkov
crew.note: Highest calorie need from EVA work and physical maintenance tasks. Comfort food preference — potatoes remind him of home. Appreciates hearty potato-based meals after EVA shifts.

crew.name: Spc. Reyes
crew.note: Monitors crop health daily. Emotional attachment to the greenhouse — sees fresh radish harvest as mission success indicator. Takes pride in the fast radish cycle. Enjoys fresh salads with lettuce, radish, and basil.

crew_aggregate.note: Sum of adjusted calories: 2850 + 2700 + 3300 + 3150 = 12,000 kcal/day for full crew (using modifiers: 11,700 adjusted, but we use 12,000 baseline for safety margin)

mission.total_calories_required_note: 4 crew x 450 sols x 3,000 kcal = 5,400,000 kcal (Syngenta KB baseline)

vitamin_d.reason: No plant produces vitamin D. Supplementation is mandatory.
vitamin_d.risk_if_deficient: Bone density loss accelerated by Mars partial gravity (0.38g). Immune function decline.

vitamin_b12.source: Stored B12 supplements or fortified stored food
vitamin_b12.reason: B12 only found in animal products. No animal agriculture in greenhouse.
vitamin_b12.risk_if_deficient: Megaloblastic anemia, neurological damage over extended deficiency.

omega_3_fatty_acids.source: Stored fish oil capsules or algae-derived DHA/EPA
omega_3_fatty_acids.reason: No omega-3 producing crops in current greenhouse plan. Soybean provides some ALA but conversion to DHA/EPA is poor (~5%).
